form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== mrpPlanId[MRP 计划] lineNo[行号] materialId[物料] uoMId[计量单位] =========>quantity[数量信息]====== quantity[需求数量] requirementDate[需求日期] =========>reference[业务关联]====== demandSource[需求来源] sourceBillType[来源单据类型] sourceBillCode[来源单据号] ========^audit[审计信息]========= createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]
